summary: Phase 01 (G0) claim-freeze/docs repair completed: added stack-conformance baseline + restricted acceptance vocabulary docs, aligned app README and checklist reading rules, removed unsupported full-closure wording from phase1-3 checklists, and softened phase8 wording to avoid product production-readiness overclaim; all phase-relevant checks passed.
remaining_risks: Until phase 02 claim-lint validator lands, overclaim prevention is enforced by documentation rules rather than automatic lint rejection.
Repository worktree contains broad unrelated in-progress changes, so loop-gate changed-files scope is wider than this phase patch.
